name: Divinely Decadent Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring corn syrup and butter to a boil, stirring.
2. Remove from heat. Add chocolate, stir until melted. Stir in sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Blend in flour and nuts (walnuts or pecans).
3. Grease and flour a 9-inch layer cake pan. Pour mixture into the pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Remove and cool completely on a rack.
5. To prepare glaze, stir together chocolate, butter, and syrup over low heat in a saucepan. Remove from heat and stir in cream or milk.
6. Pour glaze over the cooled cake. Let stand for 1 hour.
7. Garnish with whole pecans or walnuts. Cut into wedges to serve.
I hope you enjoy this cake. It is a cross between a cake, brownie, and fudge. You can also top each slice with whipped cream if you like. Enjoy.
